title: Amazon Basics Nonstick Round Carbon Steel Muffin Pan, 2-Pack, Grey, 13.9x10.55x1.22"
features: Set of 2 muffin pans, each with 12 cups (24 cups total)―ideal for baking muffins, cupcakes, and more
Heavy-weight carbon-steel construction provides durability and fast, even heating for uniform browning
Nonstick coating ensures effortless food release; oven-safe to 220 °C
Hand washing recommended; fits Amazon Basics silicone baking cups (not included)
Part of the Amazon Basics nonstick carbon-steel bakeware collection
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics Kitchen Collection AmazonBasics Nonstick Carbon-Steel Baking Sheet - 2 Pack Make delicious baked goods at home with this set of nonstick carbon-steel muffin pans from AmazonBasics. The bakeware provides 12 cups per pan (24 cups total)—perfect for the whole family or a bake sale at school. In addition to endless varieties of muffins and cupcakes, the pan can also be used for a wide range of savory or sweet single-serving creations—from hash-brown cups and poached eggs to mini cheesecakes or frozen peanut butter cups. Heavy-Weight Carbon Steel Thanks to its heavy-weight, carbon-steel construction, the bakeware reliably resists warping and heats evenly throughout, so there’s no hot spots to worry about, which can burn baked goods. The bakeware consistently delivers beautifully browned results and can be trusted with all your favorite recipes. Details Set of 2 muffin pans; 12 cups per pan Made of heavy-weight carbon steel Nonstick coating ensures easy release Oven-safe to 220 degrees C Hand washing recommended Fits AmazonBasics silicone baking cups (sold separately) Nonstick Coating The bakeware’s durable nonstick coating helps ensure quick, effortless food release—no need for excess butter, oil, or cooking spray. Delicious homemade baked goods slide out in one smooth move. How to Clean To protect the nonstick coating, be sure to use nylon, wooden, or coated utensils, and avoid using metal utensils, scouring pads, or abrasive cleaners. The nonstick bakeware cleans effortlessly, and washing the pan by hand is recommended.
